studentStories.name: Priya Sharma
studentStories.story: The Sanskrit course completely transformed my understanding of ancient texts. The structured approach made complex concepts accessible.

studentStories.name: Arjun Patel
studentStories.story: The Advaita Vedanta course opened my mind to profound philosophical insights. The teaching methodology is exceptional.

studentStories.name: Sneha Reddy
studentStories.story: The Yoga Darshan course helped me understand the deeper aspects of yoga philosophy. Highly recommended for serious practitioners.

studentStories.name: Rajesh Kumar
studentStories.story: The Kashmir Shaivism course provided deep insights into non-dual philosophy. The instructors are world-class.

studentStories.name: Meera Singh
studentStories.story: The Nyaya Darshan course enhanced my logical reasoning skills. The systematic approach to Indian logic is remarkable.
